account.bio:
Triple Excellent, every time.
The value of a diamond is in its polish.
Work with us: 03-6381-7541 / info@eiwa-material.com

posts.caption:
Three decades. One obsession: the perfect polish.
For 30 years, we've shaped the world's highest-value diamonds — where trust is cut as precisely as the stone itself. ✨
#DiamondPolishing #30YearsOfTrust #EIWA #LuxuryDiamonds #JapaneseCraftsmanship

Consistently achieving Triple Excellent.
Cut. Polish. Symmetry. When all three reach Excellent, light has nowhere to hide. This is the standard we never compromise. 💎
#3EX #TripleExcellent #DiamondCut #BrillianceRedefined #EIWA

comments.text: light has nowhere to hide — perfectly said

posts.caption:
The world stops at 3EX. We begin there.
Our craftsmen pursue a level of precision the grading charts don't even measure. 200× fewer polishing marks. 10–20× more light return.
#BeyondStandard #DiamondScience #PrecisionPolishing #EIWA #FineJewelry

A second life, a brighter shine.
Our recutting service revives tired or dated stones — restoring fire that time and old cuts had dimmed.
#DiamondRecutting #Restoration #SecondLife #EIWA #DiamondExperts

Cuts inspired by Japanese aesthetics.
Beyond the standard round — bespoke cuts born from the quiet discipline of Japanese design. 🌸
#OriginalCut #JapaneseAesthetics #BespokeDiamonds #EIWA #ArtOfTheCut

Exceptional craftsmen, backed by 30 years of trust.
Every facet passes through experienced hands. Machines measure — masters decide.
#MasterCraftsman #DiamondPolisher #Handcrafted #EIWA #Artisan

From rough selection to final polish.
The journey of a diamond is decided long before the first cut — it begins with choosing the right rough.
#RoughDiamond #DiamondJourney #FromRoughToFinal #EIWA #DiamondPolishing

"God resides in the details."
A single polishing mark, invisible to most, is everything to us. Perfection lives in what you cannot see.
#InTheDetails #Perfection #DiamondPolishing #EIWA #LuxuryCraft

Trusted by the world's diamond institutions.
From our factories to global vaults — the standard that the industry's most demanding partners rely on.
#TrustedWorldwide #DiamondInstitutions #GlobalStandard #EIWA #FineDiamonds

The value of a diamond is determined by its polish.
Entrust your diamonds to us — and let their true light be revealed. ✨
#DiamondValue #ThePolishMatters #EntrustYourDiamonds #EIWA #30YearsOfTrust
